title: Reporting of Erring Employer/Principal. The LMA shall report to the
content: 4 Department any information that comes to the knowledge of the agency, with respect to 5 any violation of these Rules by their principal/employer. The matter shall be referred to 6 the Office of the Undersecretary for Foreign Employment and Welfare Services and/or 7 Office of the Undersecretary for Licensing and Adjudication for appropriate action. 8 9
